name: image
description: Image loading, saving, and manipulation primitives. Based on iospharo JPEGReaderPlugin and JPEGReadWriter2Plugin.
author: Phograph Team

primitives.name: image-load
primitives.description: Load an image from a file path (JPEG, PNG). Input: file path. Output: image handle.

primitives.name: image-save-jpeg
primitives.description: Save an image as JPEG. Inputs: image, file path, quality (1-100). Output: success boolean.

primitives.name: image-save-png
primitives.description: Save an image as PNG. Inputs: image, file path. Output: success boolean.

primitives.name: image-decode-jpeg
primitives.description: Decode JPEG data bytes into an image. Input: byte data. Output: image handle.

primitives.name: image-encode-jpeg
primitives.description: Encode an image as JPEG data bytes. Inputs: image, quality (1-100). Output: byte data.

primitives.name: image-width
primitives.description: Get image width in pixels. Input: image. Output: integer width.

primitives.name: image-height
primitives.description: Get image height in pixels. Input: image. Output: integer height.

primitives.name: image-resize
primitives.description: Resize an image. Inputs: image, new width, new height. Output: resized image.

primitives.name: image-crop
primitives.description: Crop an image to a rectangle. Inputs: image, origin (x,y list), size (w,h list). Output: cropped image.

primitives.name: image-get-pixel
primitives.description: Get pixel color at coordinates. Inputs: image, x, y. Output: color (RGBA list).

primitives.name: image-set-pixel
primitives.description: Set pixel color at coordinates. Inputs: image, (x,y list), color (RGBA list). Output: modified image.

primitives.name: image-create
primitives.description: Create a blank image. Inputs: width, height, fill color (RGBA list). Output: image handle.

primitives.name: image-flip-h
primitives.description: Flip an image horizontally. Input: image. Output: flipped image.

primitives.name: image-flip-v
primitives.description: Flip an image vertically. Input: image. Output: flipped image.

primitives.name: image-grayscale
primitives.description: Convert an image to grayscale. Input: image. Output: grayscale image.
